Welcome to Orgalicious, where health meets flavor & convenience meets nutrition.

Since our debut in July 2018, Orgalicious has revolutionized meal preparation by serving you fresh, flavor-packed meals designed to fuel your fitness goals.

Explore weekly menuView meal packages
5000+ happy clientsNutritionist-designed menusMorning & evening delivery
WholeFoods
orgalicious
mealprep

How it works

Step 1

Assigned nutritionist

A dedicated nutritionist takes your basic medical details, height, weight, food allergies (if any), and fitness goals upon sign-up.

Step 2

Menu design

Nutritionist designs your weekly menu as per your needs.

Step 3

Client review & finalization

Client review and menu finalization happens from your end before the plan is locked.

Step 4

Meal delivery

Orgalicious delivers flavor-packed meals straight to you the next day, ready to fuel your fitness goal.

+91 7291068353+91 8510026005@orgaliciousfoodsorgaliciousfoods@gmail.com

Get a taste of the Orgalicious subscription

A brochure-faithful meal prep experience

Crafted to feel close to the printed brochure: bold lime accents, dark textured panels, plated dishes, and a clear subscription story built around convenience, nutrition, and taste.

Extensive variety
Freshly prepared for every order
Doorstep delivery
Calorie counted meals
Crafted by seasoned chefs & nutritionists
No added preservatives

Sample weekly menu

Orgalicious meal plan for lean muscle gain

Cleaner on the web, but still grounded in the brochure copy and structure.

Nutritionist curated

Designed around your goals, allergies, food preferences, and activity level.

6-day fresh rotation

A Monday-to-Saturday menu that feels varied instead of repetitive or boxed-in.

Lean-muscle focused

Balanced portions, calorie awareness, and protein-forward choices across the week.

01

Monday

2 curated meals

  • Multigrain paneer grilled sandwiches served with salsa dip
  • Farmfresh mexican salad topped with portion of fruit and served with a pack of doritos
02

Tuesday

2 curated meals

  • Soya chunks gravy with whole wheat kulcha served with onion rings and mint dip
  • Achari paneer tikka served with onion rings and mint dip
03

Wednesday

2 curated meals

  • Quinoa couscous upma topped with pomegranate and peanut served with yogurt
  • Spinach stuffed soya chaap roulade served with corn cob cooked in orange juice and mint dip
04

Thursday

2 curated meals

  • Multigrain falafel wrap served with airfried nuggets and salsa dip
  • Chickpeas and green sprouts salad chaat topped with peanut and pomegranate
05

Friday

2 curated meals

  • Amritsari veg keema served with focaccia bread and mint dip
  • Saute vegetables malabar salad topped with peanut
06

Saturday

2 curated meals

  • Brown rice served with saute vegetable and cottage cheese in tomato basil sauce
  • Soya chaap tikka served with mint dip and onion rings
Morning and evening delivery slots availableSee meal packages

Brochure menu spreads

Direct brochure visuals for maximum accuracy

These pages from the original brochure are included directly so the website keeps the same dish compositions, white callout capsules, and page-by-page art direction.
